unreachable: nvd.nist.gov (redirects to change-timeline page — no CVE listing)

findings.title: 🚨 CVE-2025-66376 UPDATE — APT28 (GRU) Confirmed Exploiting Zimbra XSS Against Ukrainian Government
findings.affected_technology: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) Classic UI — all versions prior to patched build
findings.summary: Russian APT28 (GRU) confirmed actively exploiting CVE-2025-66376 against Ukrainian government. CSS @import XSS steals session tokens. CISA KEV due 2026-04-01. Raise to P0 — nation-state exploitation confirmed.

findings.title: Citrix NetScaler CVE-2025-5777 — Mass Exploitation: 500+ Honeypot Hits in 24 Hours
findings.affected_technology: Citrix NetScaler ADC and Gateway — unpatched instances; CVE-2023-4966 also targeted
findings.summary: Defused Cyber honeypot recorded 500+ exploit attempts on March 16 against CVE-2025-5777 and CVE-2023-4966. Mass scanning phase underway. CISA KEV June 2025. Unpatched NetScaler = P0.

findings.title: DarkSword iOS Full-Chain Exploit Kit — 3 Zero-Days, 6 CVEs, UNC6353 (Russia) Targeting Ukraine
findings.affected_technology: Apple iOS 18.4 through 18.7; fixed in iOS 18.7.3 / iOS 26.2 or later
findings.summary: GTIG/iVerify/Lookout: DarkSword iOS kit (6 CVEs, 3 zero-days) achieves zero-click full device takeover. Russian UNC6353 targets Ukraine; also used against Saudi Arabia, Turkey, Malaysia. Steals credentials and crypto wallets. Update iOS to >=18.7.3 immediately.

findings.title: The Gentlemen RaaS — CVE-2024-55591 FortiOS Auth Bypass; 14,700 Compromised Devices in Operational Database
findings.affected_technology: Fortinet FortiOS and FortiProxy — all versions vulnerable to CVE-2024-55591 authentication bypass
findings.summary: Group-IB: 'The Gentlemen' RaaS (~20 members) uses CVE-2024-55591 FortiOS auth bypass with a database of 14,700 exploited FortiGates and 969 validated VPN credentials. 94 orgs hit since July 2025. BYOVD defense evasion. Any unpatched FortiGate is actively at risk.

findings.title: 'PolyShell' — Unauthenticated RCE/XSS on Magento/Adobe Commerce; No Production Patch Available
findings.affected_technology: Magento 2 / Adobe Commerce all versions up to and including 2.4.8; fix only in 2.4.9 alpha2
findings.summary: Sansec: unauthenticated polyglot file upload via REST API cart endpoint yields RCE (most configs) or stored XSS. Exploit method circulating. Adobe has no production patch. Mitigation: block web access to pub/media/custom_options/ and audit for backdoors.

findings.title: BMC FootPrints ITSM — Pre-Auth RCE via 4-CVE Chain (Auth Bypass + SSRF + Java Deserialization)
findings.affected_technology: BMC FootPrints ITSM — all versions prior to September 2025 patch; first public disclosure today
findings.summary: First public disclosure: 4-CVE pre-auth RCE chain in BMC FootPrints. Auth bypass extracts guest token; AspectJWeaver gadget in VIEWSTATE deserialization writes shell to Tomcat webroot. Patched Sept 2025 but ITSM platforms commonly lag updates — verify version immediately.

findings.title: CVE-2026-22557 — Ubiquiti UniFi CVSS 10.0 Unauthenticated Path Traversal Enables Account Takeover
findings.affected_technology: Ubiquiti UniFi Network Application <= 10.1.85; fixed in 10.1.89 / 10.2.97 / 9.0.118
findings.summary: CVSS 10.0 unauthenticated path traversal in UniFi Network App: network-adjacent attacker can read files and hijack accounts (no auth, no user interaction). Second flaw: authenticated NoSQL injection for privilege escalation. GRU previously abused Ubiquiti hardware. Update immediately.

findings.title: CursorJack — Proofpoint PoC: Cursor IDE MCP Deep Links Enable One-Click Arbitrary Command Execution
findings.affected_technology: Cursor IDE — all versions supporting MCP deep links via cursor:// protocol handler
findings.summary: Proofpoint PoC: cursor:// deep links with malicious mcp.json execute arbitrary local commands or install rogue remote MCP server after single-click + accept. Public PoC live. Developer security teams: restrict external deep link acceptance and audit MCP server allowlists.

findings.title: CVE-2026-22733 — Spring Security Authentication Bypass via CloudFoundry Actuator Path (CVSS 8.2)
findings.summary: Spring Boot Actuator apps bypass auth when endpoints share CloudFoundry Actuator path. Published 2026-03-19. Five major Spring Security release lines affected. Fix: upgrade to >=4.0.4 / >=3.5.12 / >=3.4.15 / >=3.3.18 / >=2.7.32 depending on branch.

noted.summary: New C++ C2 framework SnappyClient delivered via HijackLoader (Telefónica-impersonating site). Features: keylogging, screenshots, remote terminal, browser cred theft. AMSI bypass + Heaven's Gate + direct syscalls. Cryptocurrency theft focus.
Compromised Pakistani gov site (wasafaisalabad.gop.pk) serves fake CAPTCHA ClickFix lure installing MSI that drops AutoHotKey backdoor. Ongoing ClickFix campaign variant.

SEC Consult disclosed medium-severity flaws: weak brute-force protection enabling password spraying + username enumeration (CVE-2025-62181); IDOR bypasses authz for file access (CVE-2025-9559). Patched in 24.1.4 / 24.2.4 / 25.1.1.
Rapid7 reports surge in Teams-based IT impersonation phishing deploying malware via Quick Assist remote access. Teams allows external messages by default — functionally no email gateway.

FortiGuard: six-month Iran-linked infrastructure buildup (US shell companies) positioned for retaliation post-airstrikes. Regional cyber activity rising but no confirmed large-scale attack yet. Harden credentials and reduce attack surface.
